title: The Return of the Obra Dinn Gameplay Map

subject.name: The Return of the Obra Dinn

narrative.description: Return of the Obra Dinn is a deduction mystery where an insurance investigator uses a pocket watch to witness frozen moments of death aboard a ghost ship and identify every victim and killer.
narrative.core_loop: Explore the Obra Dinn, trigger death tableaux with the pocket watch, gather clues from scenes, and fill the ship's log with correct names and fates for all sixty passengers.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Return of the Obra Dinn, reconstruct incidents from witness accounts and scene evidence.
mechanics.expression: In The Return of the Obra Dinn, reconstruct incidents from witness accounts and scene evidence.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Return of the Obra Dinn, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.
mechanics.expression: In The Return of the Obra Dinn, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Return of the Obra Dinn, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience The Return of the Obra Dinn through its core puzzle loop.
